project_type: TypeScript monorepo (Turborepo + pnpm workspace) with 16 apps and multiple shared packages/services
verification_instructions: Run typecheck and test for affected packages: pnpm --filter @quant/common typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/shared-ui typecheck && etc.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js >= 22 required.
contribution_requirements: Uses conventional commits, husky for pre-commit hooks, lint-staged for formatting
key_patterns: - DOMPurify-based sanitization in packages/shared-ui/src/utils/sanitize.ts (but bypasses on SSR). - Auth package has secure random utilities in packages/auth/src/crypto/secure-random.ts. - Email regex validation patterns in multiple files. - Math.random() used in security-sensitive ID generation. - dangerouslySetInnerHTML always paired with sanitize functions from shared-ui.
directory_structure: apps/ - 16 Next.js/React apps; packages/ - shared TS packages; services/ - microservices; e2e/ - Playwright tests; scripts/ - utility scripts
